prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-4PCCOFFEEMUGS-54716 Product Type: DRINKING_CUP Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Ceramic Modern Dipped Coffee Cups Set with Hanging Stand Kitchen Decor, 4pc Description: Calling all coffee drinkers. This charming four-piece coffee cup set with a metal stand holds a generous 11oz’s of your favorite hot beverage and features a sturdy handle for comfortable gripping when sipping. Made from durable and quality stoneware, the coffee mugs will stand up to lots of wear and tear and are dishwasher safe too.

The design of the coffee cups is fresh and modern. The coffee mugs come in fun but not overpowering colors of soft red, pastel aqua, muted blue and light pink with cute coffee lettering down the side of the cup, plus a very useful metal hanging stand, sure to quickly brighten any tabletop or countertop.

Looking to save space in your office kitchen? A set or two of these coffee cups with a stand would make a great addition to any office kitchen space. Easy to keep organized and together, the coffee cup set features an appropriately modern and neutral color palette that saves on countertop space by stacking upwards instead of out.

The coffee cup set would also make a great gift for kids heading off to college or university, who will no doubt, be drinking lots of coffee. Whether students are bunking solo or with roommates, the coffee cups are easy to clean and the set is easy to systematize by color for different housemates if needed.

Overall Product Dimensions: 10.5 x 6 x 6 inches
Product Weight: 3.80lbs
Material: Ceramic Stoneware
Dishwasher Safe: Yes. Search Terms: coffee mugs kitchen accessories drinkware barware essentials office cups reusable dishwasher safe assorted pastel colored cool tone modern cup mug stoneware stone ceramic chic classic farmhouse folksy teacup coffeecup coffeemug cozy ounce oz large Features: - SET OF 4 COFFEE CUPS WITH STAND: Calling all coffee drinkers! This charming four-piece coffee cup set with a metal stand holds a generous 11oz’s of your favorite hot beverage and features a sturdy handle for comfortable gripping when sipping; made from durable stoneware the coffee mugs will stand up to lots of wear and tear and are dishwasher safe too! - MODERN COFFEE CUPS DESIGN: The design of the coffee cups features fun colors of soft red, pastel aqua, muted blue and light pink, cute coffee lettering down the side of the coffee mug and comes with a very useful metal hanging stand, sure to quickly brighten any tabletop or countertop - OFFICE KITCHEN SPACE SAVER: A set or two of these coffee cups with stand are a great addition to any office kitchen space; easy to keep organized and together, the coffee cups set features an appropriately modern and neutral color palette that saves on countertop space by stacking upwards - DORM ROOM ESSENTIALS: A great gift for kids heading off to college or university who will no doubt be drinking lots of coffee! Whether students are bunking solo or with roommates, the coffee cups are easy to clean and the set is easy to systematize by color for different housemates if needed - SPECIFICATIONS: Overall Product Dimensions: 10.5 x 6 x 6 inches; Product Weight: 3.80lbs; Coffee Cups Colors: Aqua, Blue, Red, Pink; Material: Ceramic; Dishwasher Safe: Yes === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
